text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-wh-whoa?! I got first place... me! Is that even possible?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
This h-has to be a dream, there's no way. Let me
pinch my cheeks to check!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
O-okay, that really hurt... Th-that means this has
to be a prank?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Someone'll show up any second now to announce
the real winner... won't they?!
choice_data_list: It's too early to get carried away.
It's too early to get carried away.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Someone'll show up any second now to announce
the real winner... won't they?!
choice_data_list: It's too early to get carried away.
It's too early to get carried away.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh wow... I got first... place. Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes hard work really does pay off. I'm so
happy, e-even if this is j-just a fluke.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-wait, I hope this won't come back to bite me
later on... I'm not being lied to, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto's anxieties last the rest of the day,
despite my efforts to quell them.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, y-you're right about that! This must be how it
f-f-feels to be on cloud nine...
choice_data_list: Let's just make sure we stay on track!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
O-okay! There's still more to come... I nearly
forgot!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll train more, and do well in my studies, and...
once I'm done with that...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hopefully in the next race, I won't do too
bad—no, I'm going to win again! I'll g-give this
everything I've got!
